title: Retextured Dyes
description: Retexture of dyes in vanilla friendly way.
body:
This pack retextures and adding different shape to each dye. 

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e9ec53941f9297a35f632971383dcf8c9eb74cc.png)
## Currently this pack contain retextures of:
- Red dye
- Orange dye
- White dye
- Light gray dye
- Gray dye
- Pink dye
- Purple dye
- Lime dye
- Cyan dye
